english translation text:
In the Name of Allah,
the All-merciful, the
All-compassionate

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍوَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text:
O Alláh bless
Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
Peace be with You O most estranged from his homeland

Peace be with You
O helper of the weak
and poor

Peace be with You
O sun of suns

Peace be with You
O intimate companion
of the souls

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ اَيُّهَا الْمَدْفُوْنُ بِاَرْضِ طُوْسِ
english translation text:
Peace be with You
O on who is buried in the land of ‘Tus

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَا مُغِيْثَ الشِّيْعَةِ وَالزُّوَّارِفِى يَوْمِ الْجَزَاءِ
english translation text:
Peace be with You O aid of the Shi’ah and the
visitors of Your shrine on
the Day of reward

arabic text: اَلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْكَ يَااَبَا الْحَسَنِ عَلِىِّ ابْنِ مُوْسَىَ الرِّضَّا
english translation text:
Peace be with You
O Abu al-Hasan,
Ali ibn Musa al-Rida

May the mercy and
blessing of God be with
You
